on_screen_text:
Riya yaar... 😢 [Riya, my friend... 😢]
Aaj Neha ne mujhe reject kar diya [Today Neha rejected me]
Maine bola "I am loving you since long time" [I said "I am loving you since long time"]
Usne hans ke bola "Pehle English seekh lo" [She laughed and said "Learn English first"]
Dost bhi thi wahan pe . Bahut beizzati hui 😭 [Friends were also there. It was very embarrassing 😭]
Arjun yaar mat maan ✨ [Arjun, don't lose hope ✨]
Maine bhi pehle teri jaisi English boli thi [I also used to speak English like you before]
Par MySivi app use karke sab badal gaya [But using the MySivi app changed everything]
MySivi?? 🤨 [MySivi?? 🤨]
Haan! Yahan AI teacher Arya hai [Yes! There is an AI teacher named Arya here]
Roz bas 15 minute usse baat karo, bilkul dost ki tarah [Just talk to her for 15 minutes daily, just like a friend]
Galti hui? Judge nahi karti, sirf correct karti hai [Made a mistake? She doesn't judge, she only corrects you]
Matlab ab bhi hope hai?? 🥺 [So there is still hope?? 🥺]
Bilkul! 💪 [Absolutely! 💪]
2 hafte practice kar... teri English itni improve hogi ki Neha khud impressed ho jayegi ✨ [Practice for 2 weeks... your English will improve so much that Neha herself will be impressed ✨]
Par ye toh expensive hoga na? [But this must be expensive, right?]
nhi, Sirf ₹1 🪙 [No, only ₹1 🪙]
Wow! 🤩 [Wow! 🤩]
Main abhi download karta hoon [I am downloading it right now]
2 hafte baad Neha ko perfect English mein propose karunga 💖 [After 2 weeks, I will propose to Neha in perfect English 💖]
All the best! MySivi download kar aur shuru ho ja 👍 [All the best! Download MySivi and get started 👍]
Great! Download MySivi. I'll see you there!
summary: A chat conversation depicts a user sharing their embarrassment after being rejected by a girl due to poor English. Their friend recommends the MySivi app, highlighting its non-judgmental AI teacher, Arya, and an affordable price of just ₹1. The user is motivated to download the app to improve their English and propose again.
